scripts.validate: npm run workflow-layout:check && npm run workflow-runtime-boundaries:check && npm run role-evidence:check && npm test && npm run workflow:validate && npm run agents:check && npm run schema-validation:check-vendor-ajv
scripts.schema-validation:check-vendor-ajv: npm run schema-validation:bundle-vendor-ajv && git diff --exit-code -- shared/scripts/schema-validation/vendor/ajv.mjs && test -z "$(git status --porcelain -- shared/scripts/schema-validation/vendor/ajv.mjs)"
